title: High speed adaptive thermal printhead interface
abstract: Systems, methods, and apparatuses are disclosed for providing a high speed adaptive thermal printhead interface. In one embodiment, an apparatus is provided comprising at least one processor; and at least one memory including computer program instructions, the computer program instructions being configured to, when executed by the at least one processor, cause the apparatus at least to determine identifier information for a connected printhead; and configure printhead interface circuitry in accordance with printhead interface configuration data associated with the identifier information to enable communication with the printhead through a configurable printhead interface.
